Describe the visual sequence of the introduction slides and background changes.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a bright star-shaped light source appears on a purple background; at 2s, white text overlays describe previous baking attempts; at 6s, the background shifts to solid purple; at 7s, the title text How To Make Gluten-Free Viennese Whirls appears centrally.

question: Outline the text content progression and visual transitions during the opening segment.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text explains the fourth attempt at gluten-free Viennese Whirls; at 2s, bokeh effects surround the centered white text; at 6s, static text slides appear on purple; at 7s, the recipe title is displayed clearly on screen.
